convenientcrafting.configuration.title: %s Configuration
convenientcrafting.configuration.enabled:
Controls the vanilla workstation recipe types that Convenient Crafting supports by default.
Default enabled ids: minecraft:crafting, minecraft:smithing, minecraft:brewing.
Remove an id from this list to disable that workstation type.
convenientcrafting.configuration.additio:
Extra recipe type ids for modpack authors.
Only enable recipe types that are safe to craft directly from ingredients and a fixed result.
Extra recipe types also need a matching unlock rule before players can unlock them.
Examples: create:mechanical_crafting, malum:spirit_infusion.
convenientcrafting.configuration.recipeT:
Configures which items permanently unlock each recipe type for players.
Format: recipe_type=item_id,item_id.
Built-in minecraft:crafting, minecraft:smithing, and minecraft:brewing use default unlock rules.
Examples: malum:spirit_infusion=malum:spirit_altar, create:mechanical_crafting=create:mechanical_crafter.
